subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon human ears have been privileged to hear what He Who conversed with God heard upon Sinai
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه فازت الاذان باصغاء ما سمع الکلیم فی الطور و الحبیب فی المعراج و
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @Mosaic imagery, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
